comment: The chicken bowl was lukewarm and the rice was undercooked. Very disappointing for the price.
Absolutely loved the Buddha Bowl! Fresh ingredients and great portion size.
resolution: Thank you for your kind feedback! We're glad you enjoyed it.

comment: Pasta was stone cold and took 30 minutes to arrive. The server was rude when I asked about the delay. I want a refund.
Chicken bowl was okay but nothing special. Expected more greens.
Found a hair in my brownie. Completely unacceptable. Will not be coming back.
Good coffee as always. The flat white is consistently great here.
resolution: Thank you! Our barista team appreciates the recognition.

comment: Ordered a Buddha Bowl but received Pasta Carbonara instead. Wrong order entirely.
